_description: OEM customer tier table. Used by escalation routing to compute priority (Tier 1 in-warranty → P1).
_calibrationStatus: STARTER — confirm tier list and any OEM-specific contract deviations with HKP customer

tiers.label: Strategic OEM
tiers.description: Top-volume strategic OEM partners with annual contracts. In-warranty RMA → P1 escalation.

tiers.label: Standard OEM
tiers.description: Standard OEM customers. In-warranty RMA → P2 escalation.

tiers.label: Distributor / Other
tiers.description: Distributors and small-volume customers. In-warranty RMA → P3.
